stardewcraftsve.animal.shop.desc.goose: A well-loved goose lays an egg every other day. Lives in a coop.
stardewcraftsve.animal.shop.desc.camel: An exotic animal from across the Gem Sea. Produces very valuable wool every other day.
gui.stardewcraftsve.farm_selection.hard_: Use SVE's hard community bundles. This cannot be changed after creating the farm and is shared with farm members.
item.stardewcraftsve.alligator.desc: A deadly predator lurking in the swamps.
item.stardewcraftsve.arrowhead_shark.des: A sleek shark with a sharp, arrow-like snout.
item.stardewcraftsve.barred_knifejaw.des: A fish with distinctive vertical bars along its body.
item.stardewcraftsve.bonefish.desc: A skeletal frame that still swims.
item.stardewcraftsve.butterfish.desc: A silky-smooth fish with a buttery texture.
item.stardewcraftsve.clownfish.desc: A colorful reef fish that hides among anemones.
item.stardewcraftsve.daggerfish.desc: A fish as sharp and slender as a dagger.
item.stardewcraftsve.diamond_carp.desc: A carp with scales that shimmer like diamonds.
item.stardewcraftsve.fiber_goby.desc: A small fish that weaves its nest from plant fibers.
item.stardewcraftsve.gar.desc: An ancient fish with a long, toothy snout.
item.stardewcraftsve.gemfish.desc: A fish covered in jewel-like scales.
item.stardewcraftsve.goldfish.desc: A popular ornamental fish with a golden sheen.
item.stardewcraftsve.goldenfish.desc: A rare golden variant that commands a high price.
item.stardewcraftsve.grass_carp.desc: A fast-growing fish that feeds on aquatic plants.
item.stardewcraftsve.highlands_bass.desc: A hardy bass found in high-altitude lakes.
item.stardewcraftsve.king_salmon.desc: A huge salmon, distinguished by its large scales.
item.stardewcraftsve.kittyfish.desc: A magical fish summoned by Camilla.
item.stardewcraftsve.meteor_carp.desc: A carp that glows with an otherworldly light.
item.stardewcraftsve.puppyfish.desc: This fish wants nothing but pets and snacks.
item.stardewcraftsve.radioactive_bass.de: A bass mutated by exposure to radioactive waste.
item.stardewcraftsve.razor_trout.desc: An invasive species with a sharp, jagged fin.
item.stardewcraftsve.seahorse.desc: A tiny fish that curls its tail.
item.stardewcraftsve.snatcher_worm.desc: A worm-like creature that snatches at passing prey.
item.stardewcraftsve.tadpole.desc: A young frog before it develops legs.
item.stardewcraftsve.torpedo_trout.desc: A trout built like a torpedo for speed.
item.stardewcraftsve.turretfish.desc: A fish with a hard, turret-like shell.
item.stardewcraftsve.undeadfish.desc: A zombie-like fish that seems to move even after being caught.
item.stardewcraftsve.viper_eel.desc: A venomous eel with a deadly bite.
item.stardewcraftsve.void_eel.desc: A strange black eel that emits a dark aura.
item.stardewcraftsve.water_grub.desc: A small insect larva that lives in the water.
item.stardewcraftsve.wolf_snapper.desc: An aggressive fish with powerful jaws.
item.stardewcraftsve.yarn.desc: Cherished for its softness and durability.
item.stardewcraftsve.fir_wax.desc: A glossy, oily substance extracted from fir tree sap.
item.stardewcraftsve.blue_slime_egg.desc: Can be hatched in a slime incubator.
item.stardewcraftsve.green_slime_egg.des: Can be hatched in a slime incubator.
item.stardewcraftsve.red_slime_egg.desc: Can be hatched in a slime incubator.
item.stardewcraftsve.purple_slime_egg.de: Can be hatched in a slime incubator.
item.stardewcraftsve.fireworks_red.desc: An old holiday tradition. Set off a colorful display!
item.stardewcraftsve.fireworks_purple.de: An old holiday tradition. Set off a colorful display!
item.stardewcraftsve.fireworks_green.des: An old holiday tradition. Set off a colorful display!
item.stardewcraftsve.shiny_lunaloo.desc: A rare variant with an extra bright glow.
item.stardewcraftsve.honey_jar.desc: A gift from the bear's companions. Sells for a decent price.
item.stardewcraftsve.marsh_tonic.desc: Smells like damp soil. Boosts attack, speed, and defense.
item.stardewcraftsve.sun_totem.desc: When activated, greatly increases the chance of sunny weather tomorrow. Consumed on use.
item.stardewcraftsve.wind_totem.desc: When activated, greatly increases the chance of windy weather tomorrow. No effect in winter. Consumed on use.
item.stardewcraftsve.birch_syrup.desc: A rare, rich syrup with a caramel-like flavor.
item.stardewcraftsve.candy.desc: A sweet treat loved by all.
A hearty platter of cheese and crackers, served with butter dip.
item.stardewcraftsve.chocolate_truffle_b: A rich and creamy chocolate dessert with a smooth ganache center. Sells for a high price.
item.stardewcraftsve.fish_dumpling.desc: Thin and tender dough wrapped around sautéed fish.
item.stardewcraftsve.gingerbread_man.des: A delightful holiday treat decorated with playful gumdrop buttons.
item.stardewcraftsve.ice_cream_sundae.de: Vanilla ice cream smothered in hot chocolate, topped with a cherry.
item.stardewcraftsve.nectarine_fruit_bre: A delicate bread with dried nectarine specks, hinting at the sweetness within.
item.stardewcraftsve.pineapple_custard_c: A rare tropical dessert with an indulgent flavor.
item.stardewcraftsve.ramen.desc: A popular dish from the Gotoro Empire.
item.stardewcraftsve.stuffed_persimmon.d: It tempts both the palate and the senses.
item.stardewcraftsve.vegan_cone.desc: A dairy-free coconut milk ice cream alternative.
item.stardewcraftsve.prismatic_pop.desc: A rare and powerful ice cream infused with the essence of prismatic shards.
item.stardewcraftsve.seed_cookie.desc: A nutritious, crispy snack that provides a burst of energy.
It is filled with void energy.
recipe.stardewcraftsve.chocolate_truffle: Purchase from the Traveling Merchant during the Festival of Ice
Purchase at Pierre's during the Summer Luau
recipe.stardewcraftsve.prismatic_pop.unl: Purchase at the Stardew Valley Fair (Year 2+)
stardewcraftsve.mail.gunther.baked_potat:
@,

I came across an old recipe book in the museum archives and thought of you. It contains instructions for making a simple baked potato — nothing fancy, but quite satisfying. I hope you'll put it to good use.

- Gunther
stardewcraftsve.mail.gunther.six_hearts:
@,

Enclosed is payment for your services. Thank you for aiding in my research and protecting me.

- Gunther
stardewcraftsve.mail.gunther.museum_60:
@,

Enclosed is a portion of the funding we were recently awarded by the Regional Secretary of Artifacts. Thanks to your generous donations, the museum has become a major contributor to ongoing efforts to conserve Ferngill's cultural heritage. I hope these funds provide assistance in your future adventures.

- Gunther
stardewcraftsve.mail.gunther.museum_comp:
@,

Thanks to your generous donations, the museum's collection is now complete. As a way of extending my gratitude, I'm giving you a very special treasure. This gem was excavated in a far away magical land called Galdora. It's yours now.
P.S. It might be worth your while to stick it in a crystalarium!

- Gunther
stardewcraftsve.mail.marlon.cherry_bomb:
@,

The mines are dangerous. These cherry bombs will help during your expeditions.
Be careful.
- Marlon
stardewcraftsve.mail.marlon.four_hearts:
@,

We received an extra shipment of supplies from Castle Village. I believe you can make good use of these. Good luck.
- Marlon
stardewcraftsve.mail.marlon.six_hearts:
@,

Your assistance in monster eradication has been most helpful to our efforts in protecting the valley. These bombs will help you on your adventures. Stay safe.
- Marlon
stardewcraftsve.mail.marlon.eight_hearts:
@,

The guild received another shipment of weapons from Castle Village. These bombs pack a punch. Don't stand too close to them once ignited.
- Marlon
stardewcraftsve.mail.marlon.ten_hearts:
@,

Camilla, the witch of Castle Village, supplied 30 elixirs to the guild. This is one of her finest brews yet. I'm mailing you half of them. These will assist in your expeditions. Good luck.
- Marlon
item.stardewcraftsve.cucumber_seed.desc: Plant in spring. Takes 12 days to mature, and continues to produce after first harvest.
item.stardewcraftsve.butternut_squash_se: Plant these in the summer. Takes 12 days to mature.
item.stardewcraftsve.sweet_potato_seed.d: Plant these in the fall. Takes 12 days to mature.
item.stardewcraftsve.gold_carrot_seed.de: Plant in spring, summer, or fall. Takes 6 days to mature.
Plant in spring, summer, or fall. Takes 25 days to mature, and continues to produce after first harvest.
item.stardewcraftsve.joja_veggie_seeds.d: Plant in spring, summer, or fall. Takes 13 days to mature.
item.stardewcraftsve.stalk_seed.desc: Plant these in the summer. Takes 25 days to grow. Dropped by Wilderness Golems in the Highlands.
item.stardewcraftsve.salal_berry_seed.de: Plant in spring or summer. Takes 14 days to mature, and continues to produce after first harvest. Dig artifact spots in the Secret Woods with a hoe.
item.stardewcraftsve.slime_seed.desc: Plant in spring. Takes 13 days to mature, and continues to produce after first harvest. Dropped by Slimes in the Highlands.
Plant in summer. Takes 12 days to mature. Dig artifact spots in the Secret Woods with a hoe.
item.stardewcraftsve.fungus_seed.desc: Plant in fall. Takes 13 days to mature. Dropped by Mushroom monsters in the Highlands Ruins.
item.stardewcraftsve.void_seed.desc: Plant in winter. Takes 8 days to mature. Dropped by monsters in the Highlands Cavern.
item.stardewcraftsve.cucumber.desc: Its texture is crisp and refreshing
item.stardewcraftsve.gold_carrot.desc: A magical carrot glowing with mysterious energy
item.stardewcraftsve.joja_berry.desc: A magically modified berry (MMO). Incredible flavor at a premium price
item.stardewcraftsve.joja_veggie.desc: A magically modified vegetable (MMO). Contains surprising healing properties
item.stardewcraftsve.butternut_squash.de: Commonly used in soups, roasting, and baking
item.stardewcraftsve.monster_fruit.desc: Patterned with eyeball-like marks. The closest thing to a Stardrop in flavor
item.stardewcraftsve.monster_mushroom.de: Grows large. Hangs from high foliage to avoid ground predators
item.stardewcraftsve.sweet_potato.desc: A sweet, starchy root vegetable rich in fiber and antioxidants
item.stardewcraftsve.void_root.desc: A strange dark energy emanates from within
item.stardewcraftsve.slime_berry.desc: Covered in an odd gooey substance
item.stardewcraftsve.salal_berry.desc: A sweet berry filled with antioxidants
item.stardewcraftsve.baked_berry_oatmeal: Warm, chewy, sweet baked oatmeal packed with berries. Keeps you energized all day.
item.stardewcraftsve.big_bark_burger.des: Incredibly juicy and chewy, a burger that will leave you speechless.
item.stardewcraftsve.flower_cookie.desc: Smells as sweet as it tastes.
item.stardewcraftsve.grampleton_orange_c: Golden crispy chicken served with fresh rice.
item.stardewcraftsve.mixed_berry_pie.des: A delicious combination of sweet and sour flavors, unmatched in taste.
item.stardewcraftsve.mushroom_berry_rice: A strange dish that temporarily reduces max energy when eaten.
item.stardewcraftsve.seaweed_salad.desc: A healthy dish made from ocean ingredients.
item.stardewcraftsve.void_delight.desc: A dish filled with void energy.
item.stardewcraftsve.aged_blue_moon_wine: Sophia's handcrafted aged wine from Blue Moon Vineyard. Packaged in a leaf-adorned basket with a shimmering bow. A wonderful gift!
item.stardewcraftsve.aegis_elixir.desc: Grants temporary immunity to damage. Stacks with haste elixir.
item.stardewcraftsve.armor_elixir.desc: Strengthens your body. Stacks with haste elixir.
item.stardewcraftsve.barbarian_elixir.de: Doubles your attack damage for one minute. Stacks with haste elixir.
item.stardewcraftsve.blue_moon_wine.desc: Sophia's handcrafted wine from Blue Moon Vineyard.
item.stardewcraftsve.dewdrop_berry.desc: A fragrant, charming fruit that grows near warp points. Grants abilities that last until the next sunrise.
item.stardewcraftsve.gravity_elixir.desc: Greatly increases the radius at which you attract objects. Lasts until next sunrise. Stacks with attack and armor elixirs.
item.stardewcraftsve.green_mushroom.desc: Eating this will make you feel reborn.
item.stardewcraftsve.haste_elixir.desc: Makes you feel incredibly swift. Stacks with attack and armor elixirs.
item.stardewcraftsve.hero_elixir.desc: Grants the courage and fearlessness of a hero. Stacks with haste elixir.
item.stardewcraftsve.lightning_elixir.de: Makes you run very fast for one minute. Stacks with attack and armor elixirs.
item.stardewcraftsve.lucky_four_leaf_clo: Said to bring good luck. Makes a great gift.
item.stardewcraftsve.red_baneberry.desc: A tasty snack for birds, but not for humans.
item.stardewcraftsve.rusty_blade.desc: It once belonged to an adventurer...
debug.stardewcraftsve.forage_spawn_faile: Could not find a valid spot to spawn %s
stardewcraftsve.shop.zoey_vendor.dialogu: Top-quality Joja stock, want a look?
stardewcraftsve.npc.gunther.introduction: Ah, a new face. I'm Gunther, the curator of this museum. I've spent years cataloging the valley's history, and there's still so much we haven't uncovered. If you happen upon any artifacts, I'd be delighted to examine them.
stardewcraftsve.npc.gunther.default: The museum archives are vast, but every artifact tells a story. Some speak of ancient civilizations, others of natural wonders. What will you uncover today?
stardewcraftsve.npc.gunther.mon: A new week begins. The museum's collection never stops growing, and neither does our understanding of the valley's rich history. I've been reviewing some fascinating documents from the Ferngill Archives.
stardewcraftsve.npc.gunther.tue: I've recently acquired some notes about the Galdoran continent. The gems they describe are unlike anything found in the valley. I wonder if any might have washed up on our shores...
stardewcraftsve.npc.gunther.wed: Midweek already. Time flies when you're cataloging artifacts. Did you know some of our specimens show traces of magical energy? Truly remarkable.
stardewcraftsve.npc.gunther.thu: The museum relies on donations from the community. Every artifact you've contributed has helped paint a fuller picture of Stardew Valley's past. I appreciate your efforts.
stardewcraftsve.npc.gunther.fri: The end of the week approaches. If you have time, I'd love to hear about any interesting discoveries you've made. The valley holds many secrets, and you seem to have a knack for finding them.
stardewcraftsve.npc.gunther.sat: Weekends are quieter at the museum. It gives me time to organize the archives and prepare new displays. I've been working on a special exhibition about the region's rare minerals.
stardewcraftsve.npc.gunther.sun: A day of rest, but knowledge never sleeps. I've been cross-referencing some ancient texts with recent findings. The connections are quite fascinating.
stardewcraftsve.npc.marlon.introduction: So you're the new farmer. I'm Marlon, head of the Adventurer's Guild. The mines have been unusually active lately... best to be prepared.
stardewcraftsve.npc.marlon.default: The Adventurer's Guild has been around for generations. We keep the valley safe from the creatures that lurk in the dark.
stardewcraftsve.npc.marlon.mon: Start of the week. Best time to stock up on supplies if you're planning a mine expedition.
stardewcraftsve.npc.marlon.tue: I've been an adventurer my whole life. Seen things that'd make your hair stand on end, and I've got the scars to prove it.
stardewcraftsve.npc.marlon.wed: Midweek already. Time flies when you're keeping monsters at bay.
stardewcraftsve.npc.marlon.thu: If you're heading into the mines, make sure you've got a good weapon and plenty of food. I've seen too many rookies go in unprepared.
stardewcraftsve.npc.marlon.fri: The guild's been quiet this week. Almost suspiciously quiet... I don't like it when things are this calm.
stardewcraftsve.npc.marlon.sat: Weekends are for resting, but the mines don't care about calendars. The monsters down there are always active.
stardewcraftsve.npc.marlon.sun: I used to adventure alongside a talented young man named Lance. He had a gift for combat like I've rarely seen.
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.introduction: Ah, welcome to JojaMart! I'm Morris, the regional manager. We're so pleased to have you as a customer in our fine establishment.
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.default: At JojaMart, we pride ourselves on convenience and quality. Why bother with that old community center when you could be a valued Joja Member?
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.mon: A new week of business opportunities! I hope you'll consider our Joja Membership program. The benefits are... quite substantial.
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.tue: I noticed you've been shopping at Pierre's. You should know that JojaMart offers better prices, a wider selection, and a more pleasant shopping environment.
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.wed: Midweek sale! All Joja Cola products are buy-one-get-one-free. Don't miss out on this incredible offer!
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.thu: I've just submitted this month's sales report to corporate. They're very pleased with our performance in the valley.
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.fri: The weekend is approaching! Our busiest time at JojaMart. We'll be fully stocked and ready to serve.
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.sat: That community center is such an eyesore, don't you think? A Joja Warehouse would be so much more practical for the town.
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.sun: Even on Sundays, JojaMart is here for you. We never close our doors to our valued customers.
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.first_members: You've arrived at just the right time! Our Joja Membership program is now available, and I'd be delighted to walk you through the benefits. With a membership, we can take care of that old community center for you...
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.weekend_membe: A fine weekend to you! Our Joja Membership is available. Imagine what we could do with that old community center — a gleaming Joja Warehouse, for instance. Interested?
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.first_cc_done: Welcome to JojaMart! Unfortunately, due to circumstances beyond our control, the Joja Membership offer is currently unavailable. We hope to resolve this soon.
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.weekend_cc_do: Welcome to JojaMart! Enjoying your weekend? Apologies, but our Joja Membership is unavailable at this time. We'll notify you when things change.
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.signup_confir: Becoming a Joja Member means the community center will be converted into a Joja Warehouse. You won't be able to restore it, but Joja will provide alternative improvements to the town. Are you sure?#$q -1 -1 morris_signup_yes#$r -1 -1 morris_signup_yes#Yes, sign me up.#$r -1 -1 morris_dismiss#Not yet.
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.signed_up: Excellent! Welcome to the Joja family! Come back tomorrow and we'll get started on community development projects. And remember — bring your wallet! Hehe.#$b#Now, let me call Mayor Lewis about that old community center...
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.come_back_lat: Come back tomorrow and we'll get started on those projects. And make sure to bring plenty of gold. Hehe.
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.processing: We're currently processing your last community development order. Please return once the work is complete.
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.cd_form_offer: $q -1 -1 morris_cd_yes#I've got the Joja Community Development Form ready for you. Care to take a look?#$r -1 -1 morris_cd_yes#Let's see it.#$r -1 -1 morris_dismiss#Not right now.
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.cd_confirm: Excellent choice! Our crew will begin work tonight. It should be ready by tomorrow morning.
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.no_more_cd: Ah, my favorite customer! Unfortunately, I have no more community development projects available at this time.
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.gift_loved: Ah, a wonderful gift! You truly understand quality. This will look splendid in my office!
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.gift_liked: How thoughtful! This will pair nicely with my evening tea.
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.gift_neutral: Well, thank you. I suppose every gift is a token of appreciation.
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.gift_disliked: Oh... um, thank you. I'll just put this over here.
stardewcraftsve.npc.morris.gift_hated: What is this? Are you mocking me? I'm a busy man!
stardewcraftsve.tooltip.wild_tree_fertil: Tree fertilizer applied: guaranteed daily growth, including winter
stardewcraftsve.tooltip.wild_tree_blocke: Growth blocked: nearby mature tree, insufficient space above, or winter dormancy
stardewcraftsve.tooltip.wild_tree_seed: Shaking may drop a tree seed today
stardewcraftsve.tooltip.fir_tree_fertili: Tree fertilizer applied: guaranteed daily growth, including winter
stardewcraftsve.tooltip.fir_tree_blocked: Growth blocked: insufficient space above or dormant in winter
stardewcraftsve.tooltip.fir_tree_seed: Shaking may drop a fir cone today
stardewcraftsve.tooltip.fruit_tree_block: Growth is blocked: clear the 8 surrounding tiles
jei.stardewcraftsve.joja_seeds.purchase: Purchase at JojaMart after reaching 10 hearts with Morris
jei.stardewcraftsve.fir_cone.growth: Plant on untilled dirt or grass. Saplings have a 20%% daily growth chance and stop naturally growing in winter; tree fertilizer guarantees daily growth. Mature trees have a 15%% daily spread chance and a 5%% chance to hold a cone for shaking. Chopping has a 75%% chance to drop 1-2 cones. A tapper produces one fir wax every 11 days.
jei.stardewcraftsve.birch_seed.growth: Plant on untilled dirt or grass. Saplings have a 20%% daily growth chance and stop naturally growing in winter; tree fertilizer guarantees daily growth. Mature trees have a 15%% daily spread chance and a 5%% chance to hold a seed for shaking. Chopping yields 12-16 wood and 5 sap, with a 75%% chance for 1-2 birch seeds; Lumberjacks also have a 25%% chance for 1 hardwood. A tapper produces one birch water every 3 days.
jei.stardewcraftsve.artifact_spot.faded_: Obtained from artifact spots in the chunks around the Community Center (10%%).
jei.stardewcraftsve.artifact_spot.old_co: Obtained from artifact spots around the Bus Stop or Community Center (10%%).
jei.stardewcraftsve.artifact_spot.fossil: Obtained from artifact spots in the stardewcraft:forest_pond biome (3%%).
jei.stardewcraftsve.artifact_spot.stone_: Obtained from artifact spots in the Desert or around the Railroad (5%%).
jei.stardewcraftsve.artifact_spot.amber: Obtained from artifact spots in the Mountain (10%%), Railroad (7%%), Forest (6%%), or Backwoods (4%%).
jei.stardewcraftsve.artifact_spot.boomer: Obtained from artifact spots in the Forest, Mountain, Railroad, or Backwoods (5%%).
jei.stardewcraftsve.artifact_spot.rusty_: Obtained from artifact spots in the Backwoods (5%%), Mountain (4%%), or Forest (3%%).
jei.stardewcraftsve.artifact_spot.salal_: Obtained from artifact spots in the Secret Woods (5%%).
jei.stardewcraftsve.artifact_spot.ancien: Obtained from artifact spots in the Secret Woods (7%%).
message.stardewcraftsve.sun_totem_denied: The sun totem has no effect here...
message.stardewcraftsve.wind_totem_denie: The wind totem has no effect here...
message.stardewcraftsve.wind_totem_winte: The wind totem has no effect in winter.

item.stardewcraftsve.persimmon.desc: A sweet, honey-flavored fruit with a tender orange flesh.
item.stardewcraftsve.birch_seed.desc: A birch seed. Plant it on untilled dirt or grass; it has a 20%% daily growth chance and does not naturally grow in winter.
item.stardewcraftsve.nectarine_sapling.d: Grows into a mature nectarine tree in 28 days. Bears fruit in summer. It only grows when all 8 surrounding tiles are empty.
item.stardewcraftsve.pear_sapling.desc: Grows into a mature pear tree in 28 days. Bears fruit in spring. It only grows when all 8 surrounding tiles are empty.
item.stardewcraftsve.persimmon_sapling.d: Grows into a mature persimmon tree in 28 days. Bears fruit in fall. It only grows when all 8 surrounding tiles are empty.
item.stardewcraftsve.mega_purple_mushroo: An enormous purple mushroom pulsing with energy.
item.stardewcraftsve.mushroom_colony.des: A cluster of mushrooms growing close together.
item.stardewcraftsve.poison_mushroom.des: A highly toxic mushroom. Handle with care.
item.stardewcraftsve.gold_carrot_pickles: Pickled gold carrots with a subtle magical sheen.
item.stardewcraftsve.sweet_potato_pickle: Sweet and tangy pickled sweet potatoes.
item.stardewcraftsve.joja_veggie_pickles: Magically preserved Joja veggies in brine.
item.stardewcraftsve.ancient_fiber_pickl: Pickled Ancient Fiber with an earthy flavor.
item.stardewcraftsve.monster_mushroom_pi: Pickled Monster Mushroom with an intense flavor.
item.stardewcraftsve.void_root_pickles.d: Pickled Void Root radiating faint dark energy.
item.stardewcraftsve.joja_berry_jelly.de: A sweet jelly made from Joja berries.
item.stardewcraftsve.monster_fruit_jelly: An oddly eye-catching jelly with a unique flavor.
item.stardewcraftsve.salal_berry_jelly.d: A sweet jelly made from Salal Berries.
item.stardewcraftsve.slime_berry_jelly.d: A sticky jelly made from Slime Berries.
item.stardewcraftsve.joja_berry_dried_fr: Chewy dried Joja berries, packed with flavor.
item.stardewcraftsve.monster_fruit_dried: Dried monster fruit, still strangely watchful.
item.stardewcraftsve.slime_berry_dried_f: Chewy dried Slime Berries with a sticky surface.
item.stardewcraftsve.green_mushroom_drie: Dried green mushrooms with a revitalizing aroma.
item.stardewcraftsve.mega_purple_mushroo: Dried mega purple mushrooms, still pulsing faintly.
item.stardewcraftsve.monster_mushroom_dr: Dried monster mushrooms, lightweight and crispy.
item.stardewcraftsve.mushroom_colony_dri: A dried cluster of colony mushrooms.
item.stardewcraftsve.poison_mushroom_dri: Dried poison mushrooms — still toxic, handle carefully.
item.stardewcraftsve.void_pebble.desc: A small pebble radiating dark void energy.
item.stardewcraftsve.void_shard.desc: A sharp fragment of concentrated void essence.
item.stardewcraftsve.void_soul.desc: A crystallized soul fragment from the void.
item.stardewcraftsve.gold_slime_egg.desc: A rare golden egg from a gold slime. Sells for a fortune.
item.stardewcraftsve.magic_lamp.desc: A mysterious lamp said to grant wishes.
item.stardewcraftsve.money_bag.desc: A bag filled with gold coins.
item.stardewcraftsve.ornate_treasure_che: A beautifully decorated chest full of riches.
item.stardewcraftsve.fossilized_apple.de: An ancient apple preserved in stone.
item.stardewcraftsve.mermaid_bracelet.de: A shimmering bracelet made by merpeople.
item.stardewcraftsve.stone_of_yoba.desc: A sacred stone imbued with the power of Yoba.
item.stardewcraftsve.tree_coin.desc: An ancient coin minted with the image of a great tree.
item.stardewcraftsve.golden_key.desc: A gleaming golden key. What does it open?
item.stardewcraftsve.aurora_vineyard_pro: A deed granting ownership of Aurora Vineyard.
item.stardewcraftsve.property_deed.desc: A property deed for a plot of land.
item.stardewcraftsve.boomerang.desc: A curved throwing weapon that returns to its owner.
item.stardewcraftsve.heavy_shield.desc: A sturdy shield that provides strong protection.
item.stardewcraftsve.monster_splitter.de: A fearsome weapon designed to split monsters in half.
item.stardewcraftsve.rusty_shield.desc: An old shield covered in rust. Still usable.
item.stardewcraftsve.diamond_wand.desc: A wand encrusted with diamonds. Pure luxury.
item.stardewcraftsve.warp_magic.desc: A spell that allows you to warp between locations.
item.stardewcraftsve.tempered_galaxy_dag: A reforged dagger of galactic origin.
item.stardewcraftsve.tempered_galaxy_ham: A reforged hammer imbued with cosmic power.
item.stardewcraftsve.tempered_galaxy_swo: A reforged sword from beyond the stars.
item.stardewcraftsve.hedge_fence.desc: A natural fence made of dense hedges.
item.stardewcraftsve.small_hardwood_fenc: A small but sturdy hardwood fence.
item.stardewcraftsve.animal_mastery.desc: Unlocks deeper knowledge of animal husbandry.
item.stardewcraftsve.cheese_mastery.desc: Unlocks the secrets of artisanal cheese making.
item.stardewcraftsve.grape_mastery.desc: Unlocks expert knowledge of grape cultivation.
item.stardewcraftsve.starfruit_mastery.d: Unlocks the secrets of starfruit cultivation.
item.stardewcraftsve.swamp_flower.desc: A hauntingly beautiful flower that blooms in murky waters.
